title: 10 best herbal tinctures for menopause
description: Red clover tinctures helps with menopause because of its rich content of isoflavones, which mimic estrogen in the body. This helps to alleviate hot flashes and night sweats by regulating hormonal imbalances. Additionally, red clover's anti-inflammatory properties can soothe vaginal dryness and discomfort associated with menopause.
